transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling CarePoint Health Services. This is Sandra. How can I help you today?

Customer: Hi Sandra. I need to check on a prior authorization for a medication and also get my lab results forwarded to a new specialist.

Agent: Absolutely. Let me pull up your file. Can I verify your date of birth?

Customer: It is 03/15/1969.

Agent: And your medical record number?

Customer: MRN-00887742.

Agent: Thank you Thomas. I have your records here. What medication is the prior authorization for?

Customer: My cardiologist prescribed Entresto 97/103mg for heart failure. I was diagnosed with congestive heart failure last year and my current dosage is not managing the symptoms well.

Agent: I can see the authorization request submitted on May 10th. The insurance member ID on file is MED-CP-3381920. The prior auth is currently under clinical review. The reviewing physician has your full medical history including your ejection fraction results from February.

Customer: What is the expected turnaround?

Agent: Typically 72 hours for cardiac medications. I am marking this as urgent given the diagnosis. Your health insurance ID MED-CP-3381920 is linked to BlueCross Premier plan.

Customer: Good. Now for the lab results, I need them sent to Dr. Miriam Okafor at Eastside Cardiology. Her fax is 503-229-4401.

Agent: I can arrange that. I will send the most recent CBC, lipid panel, and BNP results from April 28th to that fax. Can I confirm your current contact number?

Customer: It is 503-771-9922. And my email is thomas.everett@homenet.org if you need it.

Agent: Got it. I have updated both. Is there anything else I can help with today?

Customer: No that is everything. Thank you Sandra.

Agent: You are welcome. I hope the authorization comes through quickly. Take care.
